author: Siliconera
text:
Evangelion Characters Join The First Descendant in New Crossover
The next The First Descendant crossover is its first anime one and involves Rebuild of Evangelion characters.

author: Siliconera
text:
Honkai: Star Rail Kura Sushi Event Announced
The next Kura Sushi crossover event will be a collaboration with Honkai: Star Rail that stars the characters Aventurine and Sparkle.

author: Siliconera
text:
Second Ado Utattemita Album Cover Song Voting Opens
It's time to vote for a J-pop, Vocaloid, or non-J-pop song you'd like to hear Ado cover for her next Utattemita album.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Frieren FIGURIZMα Figure Is Upside Down
The new Frieren Flower Dance figure in the FIGURIZMα involves a pose of her using magic while floating upside down.

author: Siliconera
text:
Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo Manga Volume 1 Out in English Next Year
Viz Media is working on the physical English release of the Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo manga and volume 1 arrives in 2027.

author: Siliconera
text:
First Atelier Karia Characters Introduced
The first four characters we'll adventure alongside in Atelier Karia were detailed in a new trailer and site.

author: Siliconera
text:
Pokemon Japanese Game Covers Turned Into Merchandise
The games covered range from the Game Boy generation all the way to the Switch generation.

author: Siliconera
text:
Fate/Grand Order Will Have Massive Unity 6 Update
It may require 30 GB of space.

author: Siliconera
text:
Review: Mousebusters Is a Light Ghost-busting Adventure
Mousebusters continues the Odencat legacy of pleasant games, as it is another clever, often silly, story as you go on an adventure.

author: Siliconera
text:
Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World Voice Actors and DLC Detailed
Square Enix shared English Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World voice actors, DLC details, and screenshots.

author: Siliconera
text:
New NieR: Automata 2B and 9S Charms Connect to Each Other
The new NieR: Automata acrylic charms can be used as personal markers or keychains and feature 2B and 9S.

author: Siliconera
text:
Tifa Becomes a Biker With FFVII Ever Crisis Rider Jacket and Gloves
The new FFVII Ever Crisis banner involves a biker costume for Tifa that gives her a Rider Jacket and Riding Gloves.

author: Siliconera
text:
Pokemon Center Selling Pet Accessories and Toys
The new Pokemon Playful Partners merchandise line features pet accessories like toys, collars, bowls, and beds.

author: Siliconera
text:
1.0 Tales of Seikyu Adds New Romance Options and Marriage
Now that the 1.0 patch for Tales of Seikyu is live, you can get married to one of 10 romance options and see the full story.
